title: Congress mulls helping Vijay form ‘secular’ govt. in Tamil Nadu after he reaches out for support
description: Since Mr. Vijay has to resign from one of the two constituencies (Perambur and Tiruchi East) he was elected from, effectively, the TVK would have 107 MLAs. This would bring down the strength of the House to 233. Thus, even if the Congress decides to support the TVK, the party would need the support of five more MLAs to cross the half-way mark
